description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a black, grippy surface on top, likely made from grip tape. The deck is slightly concave with upturned nose and tail, providing better control for tricks. The underside is not visible, but the side profile reveals a layered wooden construction typical of skateboards. The wheels are small, round, and yellow, attached to metal trucks that are mounted beneath the deck. The trucks appear to be standard street style, and the overall design is minimalistic with no visible graphics or branding. This skateboard is suitable for street and park use, blending durability with maneuverability.
description: A classic popsicle-shaped skateboard with a black grip tape top, yellow wheels, and a minimalistic, unadorned design. The deck is concave with upturned ends and standard street trucks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and a glimpse of the yellow wheels beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the concave deck profile, upturned nose and tail, yellow wheels, and layered wooden edge.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the rounded tail, black grip tape, and yellow wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the concave deck, upturned ends, yellow wheels, and layered construction.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small round yellow wheels with no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard street trucks, metallic color, standard mounting, no visible branding
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black grip tape with no visible pattern, graphics, or text
